---
format: html
title: make_repeated_cv_indices()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>make_repeated_cv_indices</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Make Repeated Cross-Validation Indices</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Creates reproducible repeated K-fold test-index lists for use with
'sjSDM::sjSDM_cv()'.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>make_repeated_cv_indices(
  n_samples,
  n_folds = 2L,
  n_repeats = 1L,
  seed = 900723L
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="n_samples">n_samples</code></td>
<td>
<p>Single integer. Number of samples to split into folds.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="n_folds">n_folds</code></td>
<td>
<p>Single integer. Number of folds per repeat. Default is '2L'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="n_repeats">n_repeats</code></td>
<td>
<p>Single integer. Number of repeated fold partitions. Default is '1L'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="seed">seed</code></td>
<td>
<p>Single integer. Random seed used for reproducible fold assignment.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A named list with one element per repeat. Each repeat is a named list
of integer test indices, one element per fold.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
